reasoning: Based on comprehensive evidence through May 2025, the probability that Claude 4 will be publicly available before July 1, 2025, is 12%. Key evidence: (1) Anthropic released Claude 3.7 Sonnet on Feb 24, 2025 - a 3.x version bump, not 4.0 (search_3_summary). (2) As of May 2, 2025, Anthropic was still releasing features under the Claude 3.5 brand (Research tool, Integrations) with zero mentions of Claude 4 (search_1_summary). (3) AI development cycles typically require 2-4 months from announcement to public release - insufficient time for July 1. (4) No official announcements, beta programs, or credible leaks about Claude 4 exist through the May 16 knowledge cutoff. (5) The only "Claude 4" mentions are user speculation, not authoritative sources. The 12% probability accounts for remote possibility of: (a) surprise announcement post-May 16, or (b) Claude 4 being released as early-access/waitlist-free immediately after announcement (unlikely given Anthropic's typical rollout patterns).
